title: SessionExecutionTriggerRequest
description: Typed broker-owned execution trigger request for session turns. This contract is distinct from transcript append semantics.

session_id.description: Canonical session identity where broker-owned execution should be triggered.

trigger_source.description: Explanatory trigger source classification; not an authorization lane.

requested_operation.description: Requested execution intent under the shared broker-owned session execution model.

approval_profile.description: Formal approval frequency control that remains distinct from autonomy posture.

autonomy_posture.description: Operator-question and continuation posture control distinct from approval profile.

user_message_content_text.description: Optional user-facing content payload for execution-bearing turns when relevant.

idempotency_key.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency identity for retries.
